research-plan-implement.name: research-plan-implement
research-plan-implement.description: Research code, plan changes, and implement.
research-plan-implement.whenToUse: Tasks with multiple unknowns resolved only through investigation; cross-repo changes; diagnostic work before designing a fix.
research-plan-implement.antiPattern: Simple linear tasks where the path is already clear; unknowns trivial enough to resolve inline.

fan-out-judge.name: fan-out-judge
fan-out-judge.description: Attempt the task in parallel across multiple providers and evaluate the results.
fan-out-judge.whenToUse: Unknown-best-approach problems where independent attempts from different providers can be compared; catching shortcuts a single run would hide.
fan-out-judge.antiPattern: Deterministic tasks with one correct output; when running N providers adds cost without signal.

gate-job-gate.name: gate-job-gate
gate-job-gate.description: Pre-flight validation, job execution, and post-flight verification.
gate-job-gate.whenToUse: Mutating or destructive operations; production changes needing before/after confirmation; any op where a silent failure is worse than a blocked run.
gate-job-gate.antiPattern: Read-only operations; single pre-check without meaningful post-verification; ops so fast and reversible the two gates exceed the risk.

describe-after-apply.name: describe-after-apply
describe-after-apply.description: Perform task first, describe the result.
describe-after-apply.whenToUse: Resources with outputs only known post-execution (IDs, URLs, diffs); PR/report text that must reflect what really happened.
describe-after-apply.antiPattern: Pre-defining the description before execution; one-off ops where refining the description has no future payoff.
